---
title: "The Hon. Isabel Mary Warburton"
---

## The Hon. Isabel Mary Warburton

**Dates:** (<i>c</i>. 1830-1918)

**Maiden name:** (Lister)

### Description

wife of the Rev. William Warburton.  Daughter of the 2nd Lord Ribblesdale

### Biography

she married (1853) the Rev. William Parsons Warburton.

### Letters

- Letter from [1897]
- Letter from April 27th 1875
- Letter from April 20th 1875
- Letter from Decr 14th [1867]
- Letter from [August 1866[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
